zh.lifeSummary: Eva Grey是John de Grey的女兒，於大約1165年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾。她於大約1188年與Ralph de Murdac結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年在她的家鄉享年78歲。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: Eva Grey was born about 1165, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John de Grey. She married Ralph de Murdac about 1188. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1242, in her hometown, at the age of 78.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Greyは約1165年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJohn de Greyの娘として生まれた。約1188年にRalph de Murdacと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva Grey(은)는 대략 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 John de Grey의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1188년 Ralph de Murdac(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 그녀의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Eva Grey родилась около 1165 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John de Grey. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Murdac около 1188 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1242 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.
